info.description: Unified notification delivery service supporting email, SMS, push notifications, and in-app messaging with bulk sending capabilities.
info.title: Buzz Notification Service API

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of bulk notification batches with optional status filter

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, processing, completed, failed)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Fetch recipients from a datasource and send notifications using a template

get.description: Retrieve the processing status and progress of a bulk notification batch
Retrieve all registered device tokens for a user

post.description: Register a push notification device token for a user

delete.description: Deactivate a push notification device token

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's in-app notification inbox

post.description: Mark all inbox notifications as read for the authenticated user

delete.description: Permanently delete a notification from the authenticated user's inbox

patch.description: Mark a single inbox notification as read

get.description: Retrieve the names of all active notification queues
Retrieve processing statistics for a specific queue
Retrieve aggregated processing statistics across all notification queues
Retrieve a paginated list of notifications with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by status (queued, sent, delivered, failed)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by channel (email, sms, push, in_app)
parameters.name: channel

post.description: Queue a notification for delivery via the specified channel (email, sms, push, in_app)

get.description: Retrieve a single notification by its UUID
Retrieve a paginated list of notification templates with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by channel (email, sms, push, in_app)
parameters.name: channel

post.description: Create a reusable notification template with optional variable placeholders

patch.description: Partially update an existing template's subject, body, metadata, or active status

get.description: Returns service health status including database connectivity

post.description: Receive and log generic webhook payloads
Receive SMS delivery receipts from the NotifyLK provider
Receive bounce, complaint, and delivery notifications from Amazon SES via SNS
Receive SMS status callbacks from Twilio (form-encoded payload)

Bearer.description: API key prefixed with "Bearer ", e.g. "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"
Bearer.name: Authorization
